hero.title: Ukubuulishisha bwino
hero.lead: IATF ilabomba pa cintubwingi mu kushininkisha. Amapingulo ya mulimo, ukupilibuka kwa code, ukwaluka kwa butungulushi, ne ndalama sha kubombelamo shilembelwe mu ncende sha cintu bwingi. Ili bula lyalondolola uko umusango onse uwa kulembesha ukwikala ne nshila ya kubelengamo.

items: Ifyo bapingwilepo ukucita. Ukupokelela, ukusunga ifipe, no kubomfya ifipe na fimbi ifyo bapingwilepo bafilemba mu fipe fyabo mu cipao, no kufisangwa mu cipande ca pa cintubwingi. icitaboBushe na imwe e fyo mumona?

Ipusheni ifyebo. Ifyalembwa fya mapepo ya cintubwingi fyasungilwa mu kabungwe ka IATF GitHub, pali iyi webusaiti, nangu fyonse fibili. Fyalembwa kuti fyalondolola, ukwalula, nangu ukupanga cipya cipya ukufwaya kwa ntendekelo pakuti ukufwaikwa kwa kukwata insambu kwingacitwa ukubwekeshapo ukwabula ukulanga ifyebo fya muntunse ifyacilamo. Ifyapingulwa fya kukaanafikapo fyasungwa mu fyalembwa fya cintu bwingi ilyo fyakuma iciputulwa nangu ukusalapo kwa butungulushi. Amalipoti ya mapepo yalisuminishiwa ukufuma mu kusontela kwa injini ya kufwaya uko kuli ukwalinga. Moneni amalipoti: ukulomba kwa kusabankanya intanshi kushintililwa.
Amafunde yalealuka. Amashiwi yonse ayapilibulwa yaba pa cintubwingi mu cifulo ca kusungila ifyebo. Moneni IATF Akabungwe ka GitHubBushe na imwe e fyo mumona?
Ukuteeka kwalyaluka. Amalyashi ayapya ayali pa cipande ca butungulushi yalakonkapo nga yafikilishiwa. IATF-website Moneni ifyebo ukulemba amalyashi pa GitHub.

Ifya kubomfya. IATF ilasunga umutengo wa kubomba uwacepa elyo no kulembesha umutengo uulebwekeshapo uwa fikuulwa fya cintubwingi. Ukutula mu mwaka wa 2022, umutengo ukalamba uulebombwa libili libili ni mashina ya mayanda.

Ifyebo fya kukuminkanya. Amalyashi ukufuma ku kushininkisha konse nangu ukupingula kwine kwine ukwikala mu GitHub Ukulanshanya pa cifulo cakusungilamo icituntulu moneni Ukulanshanya pa IATF-website icikuulwa ca kubika ifyebo.

paragraphs: Ukufuma mu mwaka wa 2022, indalama ishingi isho babomfya pa kushitisha amawebusaiti shaba pa mashina ya mayanda (domain names).
Ici icitabo te citabo icilanda pa fya ndalama, lelo libuuku ilyalanda pa ndalama sha kubomfya ifisolobelo ifibomfiwa ku kubika IATF pa Intaneti.
operatingCosts.footnote: Ifitupa kuti bafilemba nelyo ukufilemba nga bafipwisha. Ama adresi ya pa ng'anda, ifya kulipila, e lyo ne fyebo fimbi tafyaba mu fitabo fya bantu bonse.

items.label: Ifyebo
items.value: Ifya kukumbinkanya ifibomfiwa na mugiwarafx. ukusunga ifibombelo fya free-tier nangu ifya mutengo uwacepa ukupitila mu Cloudflare. uyu mulimo wafumine ku Vercel ukuya ku CloudFlare no kutendeka ukubomfya inshita inono iatf.cc icifulo.

items.label: Ifyebo
items.value: Domain cost funded by mugiwarafx. Hosting used free-tier or low-cost infrastructure.

items.label: Ifyebo
items.value: Domain cost funded by mugiwarafx. Hosting used free-tier or low-cost infrastructure ukupitila muli Vercel.

items.label: Ifyebo
items.value: Domain cost funded by mugiwarafx. Hosting used free-tier or low-cost infrastructure.

items.label: Ifyebo
items.value: Domain cost funded by mugiwarafx. Hosting used free-tier or low-cost infrastructure through GitHub Pages.

paragraphs: Ifyebo fimo tafyalembwa pa cintubwingi pa mulandu wa kuti:
items: Ifyebo fya muntu uulefwaya ukwingila mu kabungwe.
Ukulembeshanya kwa pa cintubwingi uko babomfya fye pa kulondolola bwino ifyo balefwaya ilyo tabalabasuminisha, ukubakaana, nelyo ukubalondolwela mu bwipi.
Amadresi ya pa ng'anda, amanambala ya foni, ne fyebo fya pa lwenu ifishacindama.
Icintu conse icingalenga umuntu ukwishiba nga ca kuti alebomfya ifya kupangapanga ukwabula ukupeelwa insambu.
Amalyashi ya pa Raw Discord, kano fye nga ca kuti ilyashi limo lyasendelwa ku mufulo mu cipande ca pa cintubwingi.

header.title: Ukuteeka e citabo ca mafunde pa fyalembwa ifi

paragraphs: Nga mulefwaya ukumfwikisha ifyo bapokelela amaprogramu, ifyo babika mu fipe, nelyo ifyo bababika na kabili, belengeni pe bula ilileti ukutungulula.
